events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Birthday
angles.copy: Peace and love for Ringo Starr today, as the legendary Beatles drummer celebrates his 86th birthday. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May. We're turning up the anthems to celebrate.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Rock and roll royalty, Mick Jagger, turns 83 today. Still got the moves, still got the hits.

events.title: MTV turns 45
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched 45 years ago today, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast video.

angles.name: MTV Launch
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever. The first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us.

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994, featuring classics like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's the anniversary of Oasis' iconic debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', released back in 1994. Still sounds as good as day one.

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began on this day in 1969, featuring iconic performances from Jimi Hendrix, Janis Joplin, and The Who.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, the Woodstock Festival kicked off – three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation. What's your favourite Woodstock moment?

events.title: Elvis Presley's 49th death anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Elvis Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the King today, 49 years since Elvis Presley left us. His music continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Tupac Shakur shooting anniversary
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas; he would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur today, 30 years since the tragic shooting in Las Vegas. His legacy in hip-hop remains unparalleled.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix death anniversary
events.blurb: Remembering guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled guitar genius, Jimi Hendrix, today. His influence echoes through every rock riff.

events.title: The Beatles' Abbey Road anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes the Sun', was released in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: It's the anniversary of one of the greatest albums of all time, The Beatles' 'Abbey Road', released in 1969. That cover alone is legendary.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde of The Pretenders. Still sounding incredible.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Definitely Maybe a celebration coming on the airwaves.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's powerful anthem 'Imagine' was released in the UK. A song that still resonates today.

events.title: iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple launched its revolutionary first-generation iPod in 2001, forever changing how we listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when you could fit 1,000 songs in your pocket? The original Apple iPod launched 25 years ago today, changing music forever.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred. It's James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond film or theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles co-founder, John Lennon, would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire.
